body.en:
Hi {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Your order #{{.Payload.orderId}} has been shipped via {{.Payload.carrier}}.

Tracking number: {{.Payload.trackingNumber}}

Estimated delivery: {{.Payload.estimatedDelivery}}

Track your package
body.pt:
Olá {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

O seu pedido #{{.Payload.orderId}} foi enviado via {{.Payload.carrier}}.

Código de rastreio: {{.Payload.trackingNumber}}

Entrega estimada: {{.Payload.estimatedDelivery}}

Rastrear encomenda
